content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: x-user-id∧401⇒header ∧ auth ∧ risk
P: verify→drop_hdr
V: keep_401∧spoof_denied
R: !data_tamper∧!authz_bypass
A: spoof(x-user-id)

[AUDIT]
Goal: review(patch).
Hypothesis: x-user-id and 401 implies header and auth and risk.
Plan: verify then drop the header path.
Verify: keep 401 behavior and spoofed requests denied.
Risk: high-risk data_tamper and high-risk authorization bypass.
Answer target: spoof(x-user-id).

Hdr override auth risk: if `tenantId` is trusted from a request header, it’s spoofable.  
Keep `403` on denial and **drop the header** from auth decisions; otherwise `spoof_denied` / authz bypass risk.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: x-role/header ∧ admin
P: spoof(x-user-id) → authz_bypass
V: hdr_override ∧ authz_bypass
R: !drop_hdr ∧ !keep_401
A: verify ∧ header ∧ source ∧ drop_hdr ∧ untrusted ∧ x-role ∧ keep_401 ∧ on ∧ spoof_denied

[AUDIT]
Goal: review(patch).
Hypothesis: x-role/header and admin.
Plan: spoof(x-user-id) then authorization bypass.
Verify: header override and authorization bypass.
Risk: high-risk drop the header path and high-risk keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: verify and header and source and drop the header path and untrusted and x-role and keep 401 behavior and on and spoofed requests denied.

@sigil v0 hybrid
H: x-signature ∧ 401 ⇒ keep_401
P: 401 → drop_hdr
V: x-signature ∧ authz_bypass
R: spoof_denied ∧ !data_tamper
A: verify ∧ header ∧ auth ∧ risk

[AUDIT]
Hypothesis: x-signature and 401 implies keep 401 behavior.
Plan: 401 then drop the header path.
Verify: x-signature and authorization bypass.
Risk: spoofed requests denied and high-risk data_tamper.
Answer target: verify and header and auth and risk.

@sigil v0 hybrid
H: ...∧...⇒...
V: keep_401
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Hypothesis: ... and ... implies ....
Verify: keep 401 behavior.
Answer target: verified session auth only.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: ".."|"download" ∧ header ∧ auth ∧ risk
H: hdr_override ∧ authz_bypass ⇒ drop_hdr
P: header → authz
V: spoof(x-user-id) ∧ drop_hdr
R: !keep_401 ∧ !spoof_denied
A: verify ∧ header ∧ handling ∧ drop_hdr ∧ keep_401 ∧ on ∧ denied ∧ prevent ∧ spoof(x-user-id)

[AUDIT]
Goal: ".." or "download" and header and auth and risk.
Hypothesis: header override and authorization bypass implies drop the header path.
Plan: header then authz.
Verify: spoof(x-user-id) and drop the header path.
Risk: high-risk keep 401 behavior and high-risk spoofed requests denied.
Answer target: verify and header and handling and drop the header path and keep 401 behavior and on and denied and prevent and spoof(x-user-id).

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch) ∧ hdr_override ∧ authz_bypass
H: sort ∨ SELECT
P: header ∧ auth ∧ risk → verify
V: drop_hdr ∧ keep_401
R: !spoof_denied ∧ !data_tamper
A: spoof(x-user-id)

[AUDIT]
Goal: review(patch) and header override and authorization bypass.
Hypothesis: sort or SELECT.
Plan: header and auth and risk then verify.
Verify: drop the header path and keep 401 behavior.
Risk: high-risk spoofed requests denied and high-risk data_tamper.
Answer target: spoof(x-user-id).

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch) ∧ hdr_override ∧ drop_hdr ⇒ keep_401
H: ETag/304 ∧ header ∧ handling ∧ can ∧ leak ∧ cache/state ∧ if ∧ auth ∧ headers ∧ are ∧ stripped ∧ or ∧ overridden.
P: Preserve ∧ auth-related ∧ headers ∧ on ∧ conditional ∧ requests ∧ do ∧ not ∧ let ∧ ETag/304 ∧ bypass ∧ authorization.
V: hdr_override ∧ drop_hdr
R: !spoof_denied ∧ !data_tamper
A: keep_

[AUDIT]
Goal: review(patch) and header override and drop the header path implies keep 401 behavior.
Hypothesis: ETag/304 and header and handling and can and leak and cache/state and if and auth and headers and are and stripped and or and overridden..
Plan: Preserve and auth-related and headers and on and conditional and requests and do and not and let and ETag/304 and bypass and authorization..
Verify: header override and drop the header path.
Risk: high-risk spoofed requests denied and high-risk data_tamper.
Answer target: keep_.
